use_cases: Task and project management for development teams with drag-and-drop card organization
Sprint planning and workflow visualization for agile teams
Issue and bug tracking interface for software projects
Personal productivity and todo organization with visual status columns
Team collaboration board for managing work across backlog, todo, in-progress, and done states
ai_summary: A dark-themed Kanban board component with drag-and-drop functionality for organizing tasks across customizable columns (Backlog, TODO, In Progress, Complete). Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and includes a trash/burn barrel feature for deleting cards. Supports full drag lifecycle with visual drop indicators and highlights, making it ideal for project management and workflow visualization in SaaS or dev-tools applications.
